About CertaPro Painters® of Colorado Springs, CO

12+ years serving Colorado Springs and surrounding areas

CertaPro Painters® of Colorado Springs, CO is more than just a painting company; we're a team of dedicated professionals committed to bringing your vision to life. Founded over a decade ago, we recognized the need for reliable, high-quality painting services in the Pikes Peak region. We've been beautifying homes and businesses ever since.

Our approach is simple: meticulous preparation, premium materials, and skilled craftsmanship. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and exceeding expectations on every project. We treat every home as if it were our own, ensuring a flawless finish that lasts for years to come.

We're proud to be a part of the Colorado Springs community. We actively support local organizations and strive to create a positive impact beyond just paint. From revitalizing historic homes in Old Colorado City to adding curb appeal to new builds in Briargate, we're invested in the beauty and vibrancy of our city.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
CertaPro Painters® Of Colorado Springs, CO

Trusted house painter professionals serving Colorado Springs, CO and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
